archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Dark Fintech

spacing_and_layout.global: Generous spacing, optical alignment, dense dashboard grid.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Flat solid backgrounds with crisp 1px borders, subtle drop shadows only on floating elements.

components.buttons: Flat rectangular, 0px or 4px radius max, crisp edges. CTAs must be blue-600 or white.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-[#11131E]), border border-white/10, no large shadows.

chat_bubbles.user: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-br-sm px-4 py-3
chat_bubbles.bot: bg-[#1C1F2E] text-slate-200 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-4 py-3

components.badges: Uppercase, tiny text (text-xs), wide tracking, 1px border.
components.product_card_inline: Dense layout, flex-row or column, image on top/left, clear price in mono font, Buy CTA.

animations.list_enter: framer-motion staggered fade-up for queue cards

pak_budi_avatar.description: Professional Asian man portrait, used for Pak Budi avatar.

abstract_background.description: Dark blue abstract background for hero/login if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the REP SIDE dashboard using a dense 'Control Room' grid.
Implement the live auto-sorting queue of lead cards based on priority score.
Each lead card must have: name, priority score (w/ tooltip), est deal value (USD), sentiment badge, status pill, last-message snippet, AI Reply button, Escalate pill.
Include a Top Metrics bar with 'Before/After (FCFS vs StraitsSpace)' toggle.
Build the Simulator panel with buttons ('New high-value lead', 'Frustrated waiting customer', etc.) to inject sample data.
Build the Conversation drawer (slide-in) showing thread with an editable AI-drafted reply.
Build the CUSTOMER SIDE chat concierge with WhatsApp-meets-e-commerce vibe, inline product cards, wallet balance display, and checkout flow.
Build the ADMIN dashboard with analytics, product CRUD, and chat logs.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
STRICTLY adhere to color rules: do not use teal/purple for CTAs. Use Blue-600 or White. Dark fintech theme only.
